title: Shiny Mobs
description: Update features farm animals from 1.21.5! Adds rare, shiny variants for all the vanilla mobs using ETF!
body:
![Shiny Armadillo](https://i.imgur.com/VMPqzr0.png)

_**The resource pack is now updated for 1.21.5,
featuring shiny variants for all warm & cold farm animal variants!**_

# 🐼 Shiny Mobs
Bring the thrill of shiny hunting to Minecraft!

This resource pack introduces rare, shiny variants for every mob in the game, inspired by Pokémon's shinies. Each shiny has a unique, colorful design and its own rarity, making them exciting to find and collect.




## ✔️ Requirements
This pack uses a modded feature called Entity Texture Features (ETF).

It requires ETF, OptiFine or alternatives in order to work.

<details>
<summary>❗Terms of use</summary>

You are allowed to edit the pack for personal use only.

You may include this pack in your modpack, resourcepack or server without needing permission, as long as you give proper credit to the creator 4tobi.

Reselling or reuploading this content on unauthorized websites is strictly forbidden.

The official download sites for this project are Modrinth and CurseForge. Any other websites hosting this content are unauthorized and could potentially include viruses or malware.

</details>
